## What does this PR do?

A one- or two-sentence summary.

## Type of change

- [ ] New dot phrase
- [ ] Correction to an existing dot phrase (clinical)
- [ ] New category
- [ ] UI / accessibility improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / build config

## Clinical content checklist

*Skip this section for pure UI / tooling PRs.*

- [ ] Content is based on a primary guideline, peer-reviewed source, or recognized textbook (not copied from UpToDate, MDCalc, or a hospital's proprietary library)
- [ ] I have added or updated the `source` field on affected phrases
- [ ] No institution-specific names, physicians, pagers, or workflows included
- [ ] No PHI anywhere in the diff
- [ ] A licensed clinician has reviewed the content, OR I am a licensed clinician

## Verification

How did you test this?

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] Loaded the app locally and confirmed the change renders correctly
- [ ] Tried copy-to-clipboard on affected phrase(s)

## Linked issues

Closes #
